Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jai Chen]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — Jai Chen is mentioned by Jai Long.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Chen is Jai Long's sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Chen has always been shy and stubborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — Jai Chen attempted to stab Lindon with a knife, but the blade was bloodless when it hit his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen's spirit was fed upon by a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen's brother killed the Remnant halfway through feeding.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen needs an expensive elixir to repair her channels and core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen's madra is described as serpentine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen's madra is alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen's madra used to fight her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Lindon met Jai Chen.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — Jai Chen is a member of the Jai clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 5''' — Jai Chen was concentrating on a space between her hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Chen's core was swollen with powers from Jai Daishou's unstable madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Chen wears lavender sacred artist's robes stained with red liquid madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Chen manifested a pink-tinged serpentine dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Chen needs to become familiar with her new spirit.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Jai Chen is a small woman who fought alongside Kelsa.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Chen has a dragon that flies in aimless loops.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Jai Chen scanned Lindon when he approached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Chen was not present on the cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Chen directs Fingerling.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Chen assists Jai Long in maintaining a defensive circle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Chen uses a dagger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Jai Chen's guidance helped gather the groups.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Mercy plans to put Jai Chen in charge when time unfrozes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen led a procession of several hundred sacred artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen has spent years in the Desolate Wilds.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Chen uses his techniques with his contracted spirit as a medium.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Jai Chen is a character who was catching her breath on her knees.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Chen is a target of Jai Long's strike.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Chen unleashes a Striker technique with her and the dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Kelsa protects Jai Chen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Chen can launch a net of pink madra from her hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Jai Chen can use pink dragon's breath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Jai Chen was fighting in the Twin Star Sect territory in Serpent’s Grave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen is sitting on a rock and holding a blue spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen is grieving.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Chen wore an outer robe of pale blue and burnt orange with the Twin Star logo.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Jai Chen's Path is a blend of Stellar Spear, Grasping Sky, and Hollow King madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon gave Jai Chen everything Kelsa wanted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Jai Chen is a Truegold.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
